title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Framework Ventures raises $400M to invest beyond crypto: Report
summary: Framework Ventures raises $400M to invest beyond crypto: Report
briefing: Framework Ventures raises $400 million fourth fund as it expands into AI, robotics and energy while reportedly planning to continue crypto investments.

title: Hyperliquid added to Singapore's Investor Alert List
summary: Hyperliquid added to Singapore's Investor Alert List
briefing: Singapore’s financial regulator added Hyperliquid to its Investor Alert List, as a reminder that the decentralized exchange was not licensed in the region.

title: Australian regulator extends no-action period for crypto licensing
summary: Australian regulator extends no-action period for crypto licensing
briefing: Australia’s financial regulator extended temporary enforcement relief for digital asset businesses until Sept. 30 as firms transition into the country’s licensing system.

title: AscendEX withdrawal complaints mount as ZachXBT questions reserves
summary: AscendEX withdrawal complaints mount as ZachXBT questions reserves
briefing: Multiple users reported delayed AscendEX withdrawals after ZachXBT flagged potential liquidity issues and urged the exchange to explain its reserves.

title: Bitcoin ETFs post June's biggest daily outflows as BTC falls below $60K
summary: Bitcoin ETFs post June's biggest daily outflows as BTC falls below $60K
briefing: US Bitcoin ETFs recorded $696.3 million in outflows as Bitcoin slipped below $60,000, lifting year-to-date losses to $4.6 billion.

title: Polymarket hit by $2.9M theft, users to be refunded
summary: Polymarket hit by $2.9M theft, users to be refunded
briefing: Polymarket said it contained the compromise and removed the affected dependency after attackers injected a malicious script into its frontend.

title: Tether stablecoin flips Ether by market cap as ETH routs to $1.5K
summary: Tether stablecoin flips Ether by market cap as ETH routs to $1.5K
briefing: Ether prices are currently back at crucial long-term support levels last visited in October 2023 and April 2025.

title: Bitcoin Tests $59K as ETFs Shed $692M, Options Expiry Looms
summary: Bitcoin Tests $59K as ETFs Shed $692M, Options Expiry Looms
briefing: Bitcoin fell to around $59,400 as $691 million fled spot ETFs, the most since May, ahead of Friday's $10.6 billion options expiry.

title: Morning Minute: Kraken Eyes 15% Stake in Aave at $385M Valuation
summary: Morning Minute: Kraken Eyes 15% Stake in Aave at $385M Valuation
briefing: Bitcoin sinks to a fresh 2026 low as the selloff drags on. Kraken makes a major move into DeFi. And BlackBerry is staging a comeback.

title: BitGo Joins Crypto's AI Layoff Wave, Slashing Staff by 15%
summary: BitGo Joins Crypto's AI Layoff Wave, Slashing Staff by 15%
briefing: The newly public crypto custodian is slashing nearly 15% of its workforce as it pivots to focus on stablecoins and AI infrastructure.

title: Anthropic Urges Congress to Crack Down on AI Distillation By Chinese Rivals
summary: Anthropic Urges Congress to Crack Down on AI Distillation By Chinese Rivals
briefing: Anthropic alleged that Alibaba-affiliated operators used nearly 25,000 fraudulent accounts to generate 28.8 million Claude exchanges.

title: Polymarket to Refund Users After Scammers Swipe Millions in Website Exploit
summary: Polymarket to Refund Users After Scammers Swipe Millions in Website Exploit
briefing: Hackers infiltrated Polymarket’s website via a compromised third-party vendor, the company said, swiping millions in crypto from users.

title: SBI Holdings Says $289 Million Bitbank Deal Will Make It Japan's Largest Crypto Exchange
summary: SBI Holdings Says $289 Million Bitbank Deal Will Make It Japan's Largest Crypto Exchange
briefing: SBI Holdings has agreed to a nearly $289 million deal to acquire crypto exchange Bitbank, pending regulatory approval.

title: Coinbase-Backed Ethereum Network Base Recovers After Block Production Issue
summary: Coinbase-Backed Ethereum Network Base Recovers After Block Production Issue
briefing: Ethereum layer-2 network Base was down for more than two hours as it ran into an issue with block production ahead of a planned upgrade.

title: Story Protocol Rebrands as Data Network in AI Training Pivot After IP Token Falls 98%
summary: Story Protocol Rebrands as Data Network in AI Training Pivot After IP Token Falls 98%
briefing: Intellectual property network Story Protocol has shifted its focus to a new opportunity in training data for artificial intelligence.
